code: import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{useDispatch}from"react-redux";import{Outlet,useNavigate,useLocation}from"react-router-dom";import{fetchAllProducts}from"../redux/productSlice";import{useLang}from"../context/LangContext";import Banner from"../components/Banner";import Navbar from"../components/Navbar";import Footer from"../components/Footer";import CartDrawer from"../components/CartDrawer";import WishlistDrawer from"../components/WishlistDrawer";import IconImg from"../components/IconImg";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function MainLayout(){const[cartOpen,setCartOpen]=useState(false);const[wishlistOpen,setWishlistOpen]=useState(false);const dispatch=useDispatch();const{t}=useLang();const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();const isHome=location.pathname==="/";useEffect(()=>{dispatch(fetchAllProducts());},[dispatch]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{fontFamily:"'Lato',sans-serif",minHeight:"100vh",background:"#fff"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Banner,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{setCartOpen:setCartOpen,setWishlistOpen:setWishlistOpen}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Outlet,{context:{openCart:()=>setCartOpen(true),openWishlist:()=>setWishlistOpen(true)}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Footer,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CartDrawer,{open:cartOpen,setOpen:setCartOpen}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(WishlistDrawer,{open:wishlistOpen,setOpen:setWishlistOpen,openCart:()=>setCartOpen(true)}),isHome&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"fab-wishlist",onClick:()=>setWishlistOpen(true),title:t.wishlistBtn,"aria-label":t.wishlistBtn,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconImg,{name:"heart",height:22,alt:""})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{type:"button",className:"fab-admin",onClick:()=>navigate("/dashboard"),"aria-label":t.dashboard,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconImg,{name:"basket",height:14,alt:"",style:{filter:"brightness(0) invert(1)"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"fab-admin-label",children:t.dashboard})]})]});}
